title.text: How can you edit your comments, inputs and votes on the platform?

description.text: How to contribute to a project and think along with other participants.

body:0002.text: Contributions on the platform include comments, inputs (ideas, proposals, or posts), and votes.

body:0003.text: Participants can create and edit their own content during active phases

body:0004.text: Admins and project managers can moderate, edit, or add inputs and votes depending on permissions

body:0005.text: Customization options in project setup determine which actions are enabled

body:0007.text: In Projects → Setup tab, toggle whether participants can submit posts, comments, or reactions.

body:0008.text: Optionally disable dislikes or set vote limits per participant

body:0009.text: Admins can still add submissions after a phase has ended

body:0014.text: How to edit or delete comments and inputs?

body:0016.text: Comments: Locate your comment → Click the three dots → Edit/Delete

body:0017.text: Inputs: Locate your input → Click the three dots → Edit/Delete

body:0018.text: ⚠️ Inputs can be modified or deleted if the project is still active and not archived, once the idea’s status changes, the input becomes locked.

body:0019.text: Votes: Locate the input you voted on → Click on the vote/like again to undo your vote

body:0020.text: As an admin or project moderator:

body:0022.text: Inputs: add, edit, or remove inputs; submit ideas on behalf of others using the Author field.

body:0023.text: Votes: add offline votes on behalf of participants; cannot add or remove online votes.

body:0024.text: To edit an input as an admin or project moderator:

body:0025.text: Open the Input Manager of the project phase

body:0028.text: Update the title, description, or other fields

body:0030.text: ℹ️ Only as an admin you can also submit on behalf of users by editing the Author field.

body:0032.text: Click Submit your idea or a similar button (name depends on project setup)

body:0033.text: Complete the input form with a title, description, and any additional details

body:0035.text: Enter coordinates or street name in the form, or

body:0036.text: Pin directly on the project map

body:0040.text: If enabled, click the thumbs-down icon to dislike

body:0041.text: Undo a vote by clicking the same icon again

body:0042.text: User names of voters cannot be exported; contact support if this data is required

body:0044.text: Click the speech bubble icon on the input

body:0047.text: To address the author directly, type @username
